# One-Way Bhaarat — AI-readable site summary
# https://one-waybharat.com

> One-Way Bhaarat Pvt. Ltd. is India's intercity one-way cab booking service,
> operating since 2022 and serving 20,000+ locations across all Indian states.

## What We Do
- One-way outstation cab bookings (no return charge)
- Round-trip intercity taxis
- Airport transfers (pick-up and drop)
- Multi-stop outstation journeys

## Pricing
- Starting from ₹13/km for sedans (one-way)
- Vehicle types: Sedan (Hyundai Aura), SUV (Maruti Ertiga), Premium SUV (Toyota Innova Crysta), Tempo Traveller (Force Urbania)

## Coverage
- 20,000+ Indian cities and towns
- All major highway corridors: Delhi–Jaipur, Delhi–Agra, Delhi–Haridwar, Mumbai–Pune, Bangalore–Mysore, and hundreds more
- All states including hill stations, religious destinations, tier-2 and tier-3 cities

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91-93557-57579
- Address: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Website: https://one-waybharat.com

## Key Pages
- Home / Book: https://one-waybharat.com/
- Fleet & Vehicles: https://one-waybharat.com/fleet.html
- Popular Routes: https://one-waybharat.com/routes.html
- About Us: https://one-waybharat.com/about.html
- FAQs: https://one-waybharat.com/faq.html
- Travel Blog: https://one-waybharat.com/blog.html
- Contact: https://one-waybharat.com/contact.html
- Policies: https://one-waybharat.com/policies.html

## Booking Process
1. Enter pickup city, destination, date and time on the website
2. Choose vehicle type and view transparent fare estimate
3. Enter passenger details and verify phone via WhatsApp OTP
4. Pay advance online (Razorpay) or pay full amount to driver
5. Receive booking confirmation and driver details on WhatsApp

## Trust Signals
- 50,000+ completed trips
- 4.8★ average customer rating
- Verified and background-checked drivers
- No hidden charges — what you see is what you pay
- Instant WhatsApp confirmation for every booking

## Languages Supported
- English, Hindi

## Last Updated
June 2026
